message:
feat(storage): tick 147 misc step-log/plan/audit cluster cx-first siblings (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Twenty-sixth sibling-expansion tick. Adds 8 new storage `_with_cx`
siblings for a mixed cluster of workflow-adjacent queries that had
been flagged individually across prior scans.

New siblings:
- insert_step_log_with_cx (write path)
- get_latest_step_log_with_cx (read path)
- get_audit_actions_stream_with_cx (read path; cursor-based stream)
- get_approval_token_with_cx (read path; lookup by code_hash)
- get_segments_with_cx (read path; mmap mirror fast path preserved)
- get_action_plan_with_cx (read path)
- get_prepared_plan_with_cx (read path)
- is_writable_with_cx (infallible probe; cx seam folds cancel into
  the error path so return shifts from `bool` to `Result<bool>`)

Each sibling does a pre-flight `cx.checkpoint()?` for cancellation
budget honouring, then delegates to the unchanged legacy impl.

Test: `storage_tick147_misc_step_log_plan_audit_cluster_roundtrip`
seeds pane + workflow for step_log FK, writes one step log, reads
it back via `get_latest_step_log_with_cx` (asserts name + index
roundtrip), then confirms the remaining 6 reads all produce their
expected empty-DB results (empty audit-stream page, no approval
token, no segments, no action plan, no prepared plan, writable=true).
Verified via fork bypass: 494/494 storage:: tests pass.

Storage cx-first coverage: 120 + 8 = 128 siblings across 140 legacy
pub async fns. 12 legacy methods still lack a sibling — all in the
search/semantic + action_undo clusters.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
